title: Dark Inv
description: A sleek dark mode inventory for Minecraft, easing eye strain during those late-night grind sessions.
body: Say goodbye to the blinding white inventory that feels like staring into the sun at 3 AM. Dark Inv 3000 switches all your Minecraft menus and inventories to a smooth, dark theme that’s easy on the eyes and boosts your late-night gaming vibes. Works perfectly with vanilla and mods alike, giving you that retro hacker aesthetic from the early 2000s. Perfect for OLED screen users wanting to save battery and avoid eye fatigue. Stay stealthy, stay sharp, and keep your vision 20/20 while you’re mining diamonds till dawn.
